title: Health & Emergencies
shortSummary: Describe symptoms, ask for a pharmacy or doctor, and get help in an emergency.
culturalNote: The single emergency number across Italy and Europe is 112, which connects you to police, ambulance, and fire. For everyday ailments the first stop is the farmacia (pharmacy), marked by a green cross; Italian pharmacists are well trained and can advise on minor problems and supply many remedies. To describe pain, Italians use the verb fare male: mi fa male la testa literally means 'the head hurts me'. Knowing ho bisogno di un medico (I need a doctor) and chiami un'ambulanza (call an ambulance) can matter in a crisis.

grammar.explanation: To say something hurts, use fare male with an indirect pronoun: mi fa male (it hurts me). The thing that hurts is the subject, so mi fa male la testa, mi fanno male i piedi (my feet hurt, plural).
grammar.commonMistake: Forgetting the verb agrees with the body part: fanno male for plural parts.

grammar.explanation: To express need, Italian uses avere bisogno di (literally 'to have need of'). It is always followed by di before the noun or verb: ho bisogno di aiuto, ho bisogno di riposare.
grammar.commonMistake: Dropping the di. The phrase always needs bisogno di.

dialogue.setup: A traveller feels unwell and speaks to a pharmacist.

lines.speaker: Farmacista
lines.english: Good morning, how can I help?

lines.speaker: Turista
lines.native: Non mi sento bene. Mi fa male la testa.
lines.english: I don't feel well. My head hurts.

lines.speaker: Turista
lines.native: Sì, un po'. E sono allergico all'aspirina.
lines.english: Yes, a little. And I'm allergic to aspirin.

lines.speaker: Turista
lines.english: Thank you. I need to rest.

lines.speaker: Farmacista
lines.native: Sì, e beva molta acqua. Guarisca presto!
lines.english: Yes, and drink plenty of water. Get well soon!

quiz.question: How do you say 'I need a doctor' in Italian?
Which phrase means 'my head hurts'?
quiz.explanation: Pain uses fare male with an indirect pronoun.

quiz.question: Where would you go first for a minor ailment in Italy?
quiz.explanation: The farmacia (pharmacy) handles minor health needs.
